fflate 0.8.3 (https://github.com/101arrowz/fflate), MIT license (LICENSE
alongside). Vendored file: the package's esm/browser.js copied unmodified as
fflate.mjs (self-contained, no imports). Consumed by src/p9-import.mjs for
reading .p9c scene containers, which are ZIP archives (witnessed corpus-wide
in sources/PLANE9-EVIDENCE.md; Plane9 itself ships quazip.dll for the same
job). fflate.d.mts is OUR minimal type declaration covering only the
unzipSync entry point we call — it shadows the js from tsc's checkJs pass.
To re-vendor: npm install fflate@0.8.3, copy esm/browser.js and LICENSE,
npm uninstall.
